data.title: TNL Mediagene (NASDAQ: TNMG) plans to establish a Digital Asset Treasury with BTC, ETH, and SOL.
data.description: The Company revealed a significant strategic move to incorporate digital assets into its operations and set up a digital asset treasury ("DAT"). The DAT will focus on three prominent digital assets namely, Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL). These assets are selected as integral components of the Company's digital asset initiative.

data.title: NewtekOne will join Lytham Partners Fall 2025 Investor Conference, discussing prospects on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT), based in Boca Raton, Florida, revealed its plan to engage in a webcast presentation and conduct individual meetings with investors at the Lytham Partners Fall 2025 Investor Conference. This event will be held online on September 30, 2025.

data.title: Credit Acceptance extended its $200M revolving secured warehouse facility to Sep 19, 2028 with reduced interest rate.
data.description: Southfield, Michigan - In a recent announcement, Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) disclosed the extension of the revolving secured warehouse facility deadline from September 21, 2026, to September 19, 2028. The $200.0 million facility will now cease to revolve by the revised date. Additionally, the interest rate on borrowings under this facility has been reduced from SOFR plus 225 basis points to SOFR plus 185 basis points. It is important to note that apart from these adjustments, there were no significant alterations made to the terms of the facility.

data.title: Node 20 on GitHub Actions runners deprecated; moving to Node 24 by March 2026, impacting workflows.
data.description: GitHub has revealed plans to phase out Node 20 support on Actions runners, aiming to fully switch to Node 24 by March 2026. This shift is set to affect workflow setups significantly, emphasizing the importance of updating configurations promptly.

data.title: A 12-ft gold statue of Trump with Bitcoin in DC, funded by crypto investors, sparks debate and stands alongside a Fed rate cut.
data.description: A 12-foot tall gold statue depicting Donald Trump holding a Bitcoin prominently stood outside the Capitol building along with the announcement of a Federal Reserve rate cut. The statue was funded by crypto investors and was intentionally erected to spark controversy. This unique display has stirred mixed reactions, with opinions on the statue being widely divided.

data.title: PayPal introduces P2P crypto links, Google experiments with AI payments, miners shift to data centers, and Bitwise considers stablecoin ETFs.
data.description: PayPal has introduced peer-to-peer cryptocurrency links for users to easily transfer digital assets. At the same time, Google is experimenting with artificial intelligence technology for facilitating payments. Amid the evolving landscape, miners are transitioning towards data centers for operations. Additionally, Bitwise is considering the launch of a stablecoin exchange-traded fund (ETF), showcasing the growing interest in this type of financial product within the digital asset market.

data.title: ETH's onchain activity surge indicates potential $5K price rally. TradFi adoption and spot ETH ETF inflows fuel optimism.
data.description: The path to $5,000 for Ether appears unobstructed, particularly with the ongoing adoption of traditional finance and the consistent flow of investments into spot ETH ETFs. If these trends continue, reaching the $5,000 mark seems achievable.

data.title: 1911 Gold increases private placement to C$17m with Haywood Securities; amended "best efforts" offering.
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On September 19, 2025, 1911 Gold Corporation (TSXV: AUMB; OTCQB: AUMBF; FRA: 2KY) disclosed a revised agreement with Haywood Securities, the lead agent, and Velocity Capital Partners to modify the terms of the previously revealed "best efforts" private placement and LIFE offering. The adjustment includes an expansion of the offering's size to C$17 million, now termed as the "Upsized Offering."

data.title: Vectice partners with ServiceNow for AI governance in banks, speeding up audit readiness. Regulatory MLOps platform.
data.description: Vectice, a Regulatory MLOps platform based in San Francisco, has recently revealed a significant partnership with ServiceNow. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the way businesses, particularly within the banking sector, implement audit-ready artificial intelligence solutions. ServiceNow is a prominent player in the industry known for its innovative approach to digital transformation. This partnership is poised to bring about sweeping changes and efficiencies in the sector.
APTIV IS SAID TO CONSIDER SALE OF ELECTRICAL DISTRIBUTION UNIT

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas & Homewise award $30K to nonprofit helping entrepreneurs start food service businesses.
data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Homewise have granted $30,000 through the Partnership Grant Program (PGP) to support a nonprofit aiding individuals in establishing food service businesses. This funding was presented during a ceremony held today, benefiting the Street Food Institute. Established over ten years ago, Street Food Institute provides in-person entrepreneurial management classes, on-the-job training, and facilitates access to commercial opportunities.

data.title: Terra Firma Energy appoints EDF as optimisation partner for 5MW Droitwich plant, consolidates all assets under EDF for grid efficiency.
data.description: In London, Terra Firma Energy (TFE) has chosen EDF (UK) as the optimizer for its 5MW Droitwich flexible generation plant. This move is part of TFE's plan to centralize all operational assets under one optimization partner. EDF will manage trading and dispatch for TFE's entire operational portfolio, enhancing the company's capacity to provide dependable, efficient, and commercially optimized energy to the UK grid. This decision is a significant step in TFE's strategy, ensuring more streamlined operations and improved energy delivery.

data.title: Edimakor V4.3.0 launched with AI video and image creation, integrating Veo 3 & Nano Banana technology, revolutionizing content creation.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, HitPaw Edimakor, a popular AI-driven creative tool used by global content creators, released Edimakor V4.3.0. This new version revolutionizes video and image production with advanced features. It integrates Google Veo 3 Fast and Vidu video technology, enhancing the user experience.

data.title: Report reveals less than 0.001% chance of organic MYX trading activity; Rena Labs suspects market manipulation.
data.description: Representatives from Rena Labs informed Cointelegraph that recent trading activity on the MYX platform indicates a high likelihood of market manipulation.
